response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates exceptional full-stack expertise with 10+ years of experience across diverse technologies, including TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms. Her background in AI-agent infrastructure, scalability optimization, and polyglot programming aligns strongly with the role's requirements. Leadership in open-source projects and contributions to high-traffic systems further validate her technical depth and problem-solving abilities.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud-native development
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and modern development practices (MCP, Kubernetes)
Strong track record in scaling high-traffic systems and optimizing performance
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js (primary stack requirement)
No explicit mention of Vitest testing framework experience
Secondary stack includes Dlang/Java, but Kotlin/Java is only mentioned for select services
